{"model":"m","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"read main.go and tell me why the server exits immediately on startup"}],"tools":[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"bash","description":"Executes a shell command. Can run a process, kill a process, read the filesystem, delete a file, and inspect the running system.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","description":"the shell command to execute"}},"required":["command"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"edit","description":"Edit a file by replacing an exact string. Reads and writes the filesystem.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"filePath":{"type":"string","description":"absolute path to the file to edit"},"oldString":{"type":"string","description":"exact text to replace"},"newString":{"type":"string","description":"replacement text"}}}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"read","description":"Read a file from disk and return its contents.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"filePath":{"type":"string","description":"absolute path of the file to read"}}}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"grep","description":"Search the filesystem for a regular-expression pattern.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"pattern":{"type":"string","description":"the regex to search for"}}}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"glob","description":"Find files on disk matching a glob pattern.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"pattern":{"type":"string"}}}}}]}
